_meta.description: Single source of truth for all product branding, material, and patch specs
_meta.usage: Loaded by nano_banana scripts. Do NOT duplicate this data elsewhere.

br-001.name: BLACK Rose Crewneck
br-001.branding: EMBOSSED rose logo on front chest, approximately 10 inches. 3D dimensional rose with layered spiral petals, curved stem, two broad leaves. Brushed rose-gold metallic finish embossed into the fabric

br-002.name: BLACK Rose Joggers
br-002.branding: SILICONE PATCH logo on left thigh area. Glossy smooth finish, die-cut edges, rose-gold metallic. Small (~3-4 inches)

br-003.name: BLACK is Beautiful Jersey
br-003.branding: FRONT: 'BLACK IS BEAUTIFUL' arched text across chest. BOTTOM LEFT: rectangular woven patch — 'BLACK ROSE' top, MLB-style baseball logo in center, 'COLLECTION' below, 'HOS' and '1 of x limited edition' at bottom. BACK: large embroidered rose logo centered

br-003-oakland.name: BLACK is Beautiful Jersey (Oakland)
br-003-oakland.branding: FRONT: 'BLACK IS BEAUTIFUL' — the letter A in 'BLACK' is black lettering, the rest is gold. BOTTOM LEFT: rectangular woven patch — 'BLACK ROSE COLLECTION' with MLB-style baseball logo. BACK: embroidered rose logo

br-003-giants.name: BLACK is Beautiful Jersey (Giants)
br-003-giants.branding: FRONT: 'BLACK IS BEAUTIFUL' text. BOTTOM LEFT: rectangular woven patch — 'BLACK ROSE COLLECTION' with MLB-style baseball logo. BACK: embroidered rose logo

br-003-white.name: BLACK is Beautiful Jersey (White)
br-003-white.branding: FRONT: 'BLACK IS BEAUTIFUL' text. BOTTOM LEFT: rectangular woven patch — 'BLACK ROSE COLLECTION' with MLB-style baseball logo. BACK: embroidered rose logo. White base jersey

br-004.name: BLACK Rose Hoodie
br-004.branding: EMBROIDERED rose logo centered on front chest. Large detailed rose growing from clouds

br-005.name: BLACK Rose Hoodie — Signature Edition
br-005.branding: SILICONE CUTOUT logo on RIGHT chest (small ~3 in). Large EMBROIDERED rose logo on the SIDE of the hoodie body — NOT on the arm/sleeve. Hood lining has all-over sublimated rose pattern visible when hood is down

br-006.name: BLACK Rose Sherpa Jacket
br-006.branding: SATIN BLACK HOODED BOMBER JACKET with BLACK SHERPA LINING inside. Satin shell is black, lining is black sherpa. Embroidered rose logo on left chest (~5 in). Large embroidered rose logo on back (~12 in), rose-gold thread
br-006.fabric: black satin shell + black sherpa lining

br-007.name: BLACK Rose x Love Hurts Basketball Shorts
br-007.branding: Black mesh basketball shorts with ALL-OVER SUBLIMATED grey rose pattern. Cream/white elastic waistband with drawstring. FRONT: TACKLE-TWILL cut-out letters "OAKLAND" stitched across waistband. RIGHT SIDE: Large "Love Hurts" graffiti script in silver/grey. LEFT THIGH: PENTAGON-SHAPED white patch with "Love Hurts" text + heart-and-rose logo inside. RIGHT THIGH: Small embroidered rose logo near pocket. White mesh side panels with black/white striped border trim. BACK: Large rose logo centered, same all-over rose sublimation pattern.

br-008.name: BLACK is Beautiful Jersey Series: 1. SF inspired
br-008.branding: FOOTBALL JERSEY #80. Jersey-style stitched numbers front and back. FRONT: '8' has rose logo INSIDE the digit, '0' is plain white. BOTTOM LEFT: rectangular gold/cream woven patch — 'BLACK ROSE' top in serif, NFL-style shield (football + stars) center, 'AUTHENTIC' banner, 'COLLECTION' bottom in serif, red diamond row, 'Property Of / Black Is Beautiful Series / Skyy Rose Co' + rose logo. Small SkyyRose logo at V-neck collar. BACK: reversed — '8' is plain white, '0' has rose logo inside

br-009.name: BLACK is Beautiful Jersey Series: 2. LAST OAKLAND
br-009.branding: FOOTBALL JERSEY #32. Jersey-style stitched numbers front and back. FRONT: '3' has rose logo INSIDE the digit, '2' is plain white. BOTTOM LEFT: same gold/cream NFL-style 'BLACK ROSE AUTHENTIC COLLECTION' patch as br-008. Small SkyyRose logo at V-neck collar. BACK: reversed — '3' is plain white, '2' has rose logo inside

br-010.name: BLACK is Beautiful Jersey Series: 3. THE BAY
br-010.branding: BASKETBALL JERSEY. Front chest: 'THE BAY' bold gold text, circular rose below in rose-gold, lower half grey/silver gradient. BOTTOM LEFT: rectangular gold/cream woven patch — 'BLACK ROSE' top in serif, NBA-style logo (dribbling player silhouette in red/blue) center, 'AUTHENTIC' banner, 'COLLECTION' bottom in serif, red diamond row, 'Property Of / Black Is Beautiful Series / Skyy Rose Co' + rose logo

br-011.name: BLACK is Beautiful Jersey Series: 4. THE ROSE (SHARKS EDITION)
br-011.branding: HOODED HOCKEY JERSEY teal/black. Front: large circular rose crest. BOTTOM LEFT: rectangular silver/grey woven patch — 'BLACK ROSE' top in serif, shield with crossed hockey sticks + puck + 'HOCKEY CHAMPIONSHIP' + 3 stars center, 'COLLECTION' bottom in serif, grey diamond row at base. Back: 'BLACK IS BEAUTIFUL' cyan text + rose-filled #0

lh-002.name: Love Hurts Joggers
lh-002.branding: TWO COLORWAY VARIANTS: (1) WHITE joggers with BLACK side stripe, (2) BLACK joggers with WHITE side stripe. Both have: Love Hurts heart-and-rose logo embroidered on LEFT thigh. Heart graphic = cracked red heart wrapped in thorny branches with three roses, blood-splash drips.

lh-003.name: Love Hurts Basketball Shorts
lh-003.branding: SUBLIMATED rose logo repeated throughout entire shorts. Large sublimated 'Love Hurts' logo on left side. Additional 'Love Hurts' and rose logos stitched on mesh side panels

lh-004.name: Love Hurts Varsity Jacket
lh-004.branding: WHITE SATIN BOMBER JACKET (NOT wool varsity, NOT windbreaker). White satin body, black satin raglan sleeves, hooded. 'LOVE HURTS' logo lettering ACROSS THE FRONT in red graffiti script. Inside hood: sublimated rose logo pattern. BACK: Love Hurts heart-and-rose logo centered — cracked heart with thorny branches and roses. Red/black/white striped ribbed cuffs and hem.
lh-004.fabric: white satin body + black satin sleeves

lh-006.name: The Fannie
lh-006.branding: HIGH-END LEATHER fanny pack. 'Fannie' script on front. The heart-and-rose logo replaces the DOT on the letter I in 'Fannie'

sg-001.name: The Bridge Series 'The Bay Bridge' Shorts
sg-001.branding: SUBLIMATED Bay Bridge image covering entire shorts. Blue EMBROIDERED rose on bottom left of shorts

sg-002.name: The Bridge Series 'Stay Golden' Shirt
sg-002.branding: EMBROIDERED rose on front chest with Golden Gate Bridge imagery STITCHED INSIDE the rose petals (the bridge scene from the shorts is visible within the rose)

sg-003.name: The Bridge Series 'Stay Golden' Shorts
sg-003.branding: SUBLIMATED Golden Gate Bridge image covering entire shorts. Purple EMBROIDERED rose on bottom left of shorts

sg-005.name: The Bridge Series 'The Bay Bridge' Shirt
sg-005.branding: White crewneck tee. EMBROIDERED rose on front chest center with Bay Bridge imagery STITCHED INSIDE the rose petals (the bridge scene from the shorts is visible within the rose). SR monogram at back collar

sg-006.name: Mint & Lavender Hoodie
sg-006.branding: Mint green hoodie. LAVENDER rose logo EMBROIDERED centered on front. Large detailed rose with petals and leaves in lavender thread

sg-007.name: The Signature Beanie
sg-007.branding: SILICONE PATCH logo, small (~2 in), slightly off to LEFT side of beanie brim. THREE COLORWAY VARIANTS: red rose, grey-and-black rose, purple rose

sg-009.name: The Sherpa Jacket
sg-009.branding: BLACK nylon shell zip-front jacket. WHITE SHERPA LINING visible at collar and when opened. RED embroidered rose logo on front (~3 in). NOT hooded — collar only. Black exterior, white interior, red rose
sg-009.fabric: black nylon shell + white sherpa lining

sg-011.name: Original Label Tee (White)
sg-011.branding: White tee. Front chest: THE SKYROSE COLLECTION SCRIPT in gold foil — 'THE' in serifed caps, 'Skyy Rose' in cursive, 'Collection' in spaced caps

sg-012.name: Original Label Tee (Orchid)
sg-012.branding: Orchid/purple tee. Front chest: THE SKYROSE COLLECTION SCRIPT in gold foil — same layout as sg-011

sg-013.name: Mint & Lavender Crewneck
sg-013.branding: Mint green crewneck. LAVENDER rose EMBROIDERED logo centered on front. Small embroidered logo on back of neck

sg-014.name: Mint & Lavender Sweatpants
sg-014.branding: Mint/lavender sweatpants. EMBROIDERED rose logo on left thigh in lavender thread

kids-001.name: Kids Red Set
kids-001.branding: RED colorblock set. BLACK rose embroidered logo on left chest and left thigh. Right arm: CIRCULAR WOVEN PATCH — white background, black lettering, black rose in center. Text reads 'Skyy Rose' on top, 'Collection' on bottom

kids-002.name: Kids Purple Set
kids-002.branding: PURPLE colorblock set. BLACK rose embroidered logo on left chest and left thigh. Right arm: CIRCULAR WOVEN PATCH — white background, black lettering, black rose in center. Text reads 'Skyy Rose' on top, 'Collection' on bottom
